title: Sex and Lucía
tmdbOverview: Lucía is a young waitress in Madrid who seeks refuge on a quiet, secluded Mediterranean island after the loss of her longtime boyfriend. Amidst the fresh air, dazzling sun, and glistening deep blue water, Lucía begins to piece together the dark corners of her past relationship.
synopsis: Released in 2001, Sex and Lucía is a drama and romance film from France and Spain. It holds a solid 7.0 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2000s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
